Label: Arrest
Description: An apprehension of a subject by a peace official based on an observed or a reported violation of a law or ordinance, an outstanding arrest warrant, or probable cause information.

Label: Attorney
Description: A person admitted to practice law in his or her respective state and authorized to perform both civil and criminal legal functions for clients.

Label: Booking
Description: An administrative step taken after an arrested subject is brought to a police station or detention facility, which involves entry of the subject's name and other relevant facts on the police blotter, and which may also include photographing.

Label: Booking Subject
Description: A person who is booked.

Label: Case Defendant Party
Description: An entity being charged or sued in a court of law.

Label: Case Defense Attorney
Description: An attorney who defends a case.

Label: Case Initiating Attorney
Description: An attorney in a court case representing the party that filed a petition for a court order or writ requiring the respondent to take some action, halt an activity, or obey a court's direction.

Description: An entity that brings charges or a suit against another in a court of law. Can be either a victim in a criminal case or a plaintiff in a civil case.

Description: A judicial official assigned to a case.

Description: A person accused of committing a specific offense.

Label: Court
Description: A court or a unit of a court responsible for trying justice proceedings.

Description: An official who hears and decides a case or who rules over a case proceeding.

Description: A history of action for a case.

Description: The title and section of the U.S. Code applicable to the offense under which the defendant was disposed that carried the fifth most severe disposition and penalty.

Label: has Idb Typemag
Description: Case type associated with a magistrate case if the current case was merged from a magistrate case.

Label: has Idb Typereg
Description: Case type associated with the current defendant record.

Label: has Idb Typetrn
Description: Case type associated with the originating case if the current case was a transfer.

Label: has Idb Update
Description: The date of the last action taken on the record.

Label: has Idb Ver
Description: A sequential number indicating the iteration of the defendant record.

Label: has IFP judge attribution
Description: The judge presiding over a case at the time a given docket entry was entered on a docket sheet that includes "in forma pauperis" (IFP) activity.

Label: has IFP label
Description: A SCALES IFP label (application, grant, deny, other) that applies to a given docket entry on a docket sheet that includes "in forma pauperis" (IFP) activity.

Label: has member case
Description: In multi-district litigation (MDL), a case listed in the "PACER Member Cases" header section on the docket sheet for a given lead case.

Label: has reference to other entry
Description: A hyperlink to another docket entry within the text of a given PACER docket entry.

Label: has related case
Description: A case listed in the PACER "Related Cases" header section on the docket sheet for a given case.

Label: has UVA judge dir ID
Description: A unique ID that specifies a judge in the University of Virginia's directory of bankruptcy and magistrate judges.

Label: has Unknown Extra Info
Description: Additional information of an unspecified type associated with an entity.

Label: is in circuit
Description: Indicates which federal circuit a court is in

Label: is instance of entity
Description: Indicates the entity type of an instance

Label: is instance of entity
Description: Indicates the entity type of an instance

Label: is instance of entity
Description: Indicates the entity type of an instance

Label: is instance of entity
Description: Indicates the entity type of an instance

Label: Administrative Region 2
Description: A level-2 KnowWhereGraph region, denoting a county, district, or equivalent administrative area.
